title: Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs 14 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Veterans ALBANY AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY ALBANY AREA RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Donations are accepted and pickup services are available. 1225 6th Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Shopping hours Tuesday-Friday 9am-5pm, Saturday 9am-4pm Donation hours Wednesday-Friday 9am-4:30pm, Saturday 9am-4pm Email (541) 924-1450 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BEND-REDMOND HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales support building homes. Accepts donations of building materials, cabinets, doors and windows, flooring, lighting, plumbing, tools, furniture and home decor, appliances, and miscellaneous items. Pickup is available for items that do not fit in a passenger vehicle. 224 NE Thurston Avenue Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm, Sunday 11am-3pm Email (541) 548-1406 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BENTON HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides new and gently used home improvement products and building materials. Accepts donations of new and gently used items in working condition. Does not accept donations of beds, chemicals, or clothing. Serves as a collection site for PaintCare and E-cycles. 4840 SW Philomath Boulevard Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Email (541) 752-6637 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COLUMBIA COUNTY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Donation pickups available. Volunteer opportunities available. 164 Little Street Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: ReStore: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donations: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4:30pm Email (503) 366-1400 1 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COLUMBIA GORGE HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. 1001 W 6th Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-3pm Email (541) 296-4486 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COOS COUNTY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY COOS COUNTY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Habitat for Humanity ReStore (HFH) sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, plus a wide variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat homes for local low-income families. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4:30pm (541) 756-1600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HABITAT FOR HUMANITY OF CENTRAL LANE HABITAT CENTRAL LANE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. 1210 Oak Patch Road Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday-Saturday 11am-6pm, Sunday 11am-4pm Email (541) 344-4809 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HABITAT FOR HUMANITY OF LINCOLN COUNTY RESTORE LINCOLN CITY RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Donation pick-up and volunteer opportunities available. 1221 NW Highway 101 Lincoln City, OR 97367 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: ReStore: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-6pm Donations: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-6pm, donation pick-up by appointment only Email (541) 264-8585 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HABITAT FOR HUMANITY OF LINCOLN COUNTY RESTORE NEWPORT RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Donation pick-up and volunteer opportunities available. 134 E Olive Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: ReStore: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-6pm Donations: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-6pm, donation pick-up by appointment only Email (541) 264-8585 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MCMINNVILLE AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY MCMINNVILLE AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides new and used items at a discounted price. Volunteer opportunities are available. Accepts new or used building materials, functional appliances and furniture, reusable or recyclable paint, vehicles (Cars for Homes), metal for recycling, and other reusable items. Donations are tax-deductible. 1040 SE 1st Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: ReStore: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4pm Donations: Hours vary visit website for donation drop off times Email (503) 434-6810 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPERATION RAMP IT UP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides and helps install wheelchair ramps. Also accepts donations of used aluminum wheelchair ramps. Financial donations are accepted to fund future projects and can be given in memory or honor of someone. 5299 Aspen Valley Drive Liberty Township, OH 45011 Eligibility: Military veterans or spouses of veterans who are confined to a wheelchair due to disability and have exhausted all other resources Hours: Not applicable Email (513) 404-2476 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE VALLEY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY MEDFORD RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Accepts new and reclaimed building materials, furniture, and appliances in good working condition. 2233 S Pacific Highway Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: ReStore Hours: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donation drop off: Tuesday/Friday/Saturday 10am-4pm (541) 773-9095 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Donations and volunteers welcome. 254 W Adams Avenue Sisters, OR 97759 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 10am-5pm Donations accepted: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-1pm Email (541) 549-1621 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TILLAMOOK COUNTY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY TILLAMOOK RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, plus a wide variety of home improvement items.
